Floats and clear

A left-floated callout sits at the left edge of its containing block. Text to the right of it flows around the float.

The body of this paragraph wraps around the floated callout. As the viewport narrows, line boxes shrink to fit the remaining space until the float ends, then return to the full content width.

Right-floated callout pinned to the trailing edge.

A second paragraph mixes a right float with normal flow. Words wrap at the inner edge of the float exclusion just like the left case in mirror image.

This paragraph clears both sides and starts below any preceding floats.
